_comment: Slot pattern (canonical-store-listings.md § Screenshot principles): slot 1 = core value prop, slot 2 = Josh Approved card, slots 3..N = features. Sources map to qa/captures/<store>/<name>.png produced by the journey (name: home). Richer feature shots (add a transaction, categories) are a follow-up once the seed run is proven.
